Commentary: Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, flighted delivery outside off, driven along the ground to sweeper cover
Adil Rashid to Shubman Gill, no run, driven straight to cover. Was a full delivery outside off

Adil Rashid to Shubman Gill, leg byes, 1 run, slower through the air at 70ks and drifts and spins away from the right-hander. Shubman Gill plays the sweep and misses. The ball keeps low and spins past the pads. Hawkeye shows the ball was missing the off-stump
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, no run, pushed to the off-side
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, tossed up delivery outside off, driven down to long-off
Adil Rashid to Shubman Gill, no run, loopy delivery on off, Gill had to wait for the ball and punch it to covers
Atkinson to Rohit Sharma, no run, good length delivery on off, defended back to Atkinson
Atkinson to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, short delivery outside off, Rohit shuffles across his stumps and pulls it to deep square leg

Atkinson to Shubman Gill, no run, Shubman Gill charges down the track and looks to smoke it over long-off. Misses by a long way. There was sound as the ball passes the bat, but no one really heard it.
Atkinson to Shubman Gill, no run, good length delivery keeps low outside off, Gill tries to pull and gets beaten as the ball goes under the bat
Atkinson to Shubman Gill, no run, pushed to cover of the front foot
Slight delay in play as Gill has a change in bat. He chooses one from four bats.
Atkinson to Shubman Gill, no run, good length delivery outside off, Shubman Gill knocks it to the off-side
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, floated outside off, Rohit drives it through to sweeper cover
Adil Rashid to Shubman Gill, 1 run, wrong 'un on middle, Gill knocks it down to long-on
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, 100-run opening stand for India. Rohit sinks low and sweeps it to deep square leg. Was so slow that Rohit couldn't get any timing on that
Adil Rashid to Shubman Gill, no run, tossed up on middle, Gill fends it to the off-side

Adil Rashid to Shubman Gill, 3 runs, quicker around off, Gill makes room and chops the cut past backward point. Races away towards the fence and the duo get back for the third before the ball gets picked up by the fielder
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, no run, attempted sweep from Rohit. He misses and the ball hits him high on the back thigh
-- This is the first instance of both teams recording 100+ opening partnership in an ODI at Lord’s.
